projects.title: zskills
projects.tagline: Package manager for agentic coding CLIs
projects.description: Declarative install, sync, and reconciliation of Claude Code plugins, Agent Skills, and MCP servers across user/project/local scopes via one skills.toml manifest. Treats settings.json and installed_plugins.json as state — the manifest as intent. Written in Rust.

projects.title: nworth
projects.description: Track your net worth across stocks, crypto, cash, stables, and physical assets — with intelligent allocation targets, a powerful Action Center, and tooling designed so both humans and AI agents can safely manage your money. Three small Rust binaries sharing one SQLite file. No cloud, no auth, no Node build step.
